meaning: n.阻止,制止,控制,阻止物,支票,检讫的记号,饭馆的帐单vt.检查,制止,核对,寄存,托运vi.证明无误,核对无误,逐项相符,[象棋]将军
examples: Check whether a fuse has blown.
Could you give the tyres a check?
Check that all the details are correct.
When you've doffed your apron, take time to check out the palazzo's fabulous art collection.
If we find something, we'll send a diver in, if safe, to check it out.
